Controls whether the runtime should auto-register its close hook with the platform.

B

M

MagicRuntime - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
Shared runtime container for MagicUtils-powered plugins and mods.

Builder for MagicRuntime.

Config-aware runtime resource binding.
MagicRuntimeResource<T> - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
Managed resource slot owned by a MagicRuntime.

Entry point for the MagicUtils application.

Main method for running the application.

Registers a closeable resource to be closed when the runtime stops.
manage(String, T) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.MagicRuntime
Registers a closeable resource.
manageConfigManager(boolean) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.MagicRuntime.Builder
Controls whether the runtime should call ConfigManager.shutdown() on close.
